categories.label: Family Impersonation
categories.description: Caller or sender claims to be a family member in distress, requesting urgent money transfer

categories.label: Prosecutor / Authority Scam
categories.description: Impersonates law enforcement, IRS, SSA, or government agency threatening arrest or account freeze

categories.label: Business Email Compromise (BEC)
categories.description: Impersonates executive or colleague to redirect wire transfer or purchase gift cards

categories.label: Romance Scam
categories.description: Builds emotional relationship online then requests money for emergencies, travel, or investment

categories.label: Package / Delivery Scam
categories.description: Impersonates courier (USPS, FedEx, DHL) claiming package held, requires small fee payment via phishing link

categories.label: Bank / Financial Phishing
categories.description: Impersonates bank or financial service claiming account suspended or fraud detected, phishing link to fake login

categories.label: Generic Phishing Link
categories.description: Fake prize, reward, or security alert pushing user to click a lookalike URL

categories.label: Normal / Benign
categories.description: Legitimate everyday messages that must NOT be flagged — control class to prevent false positives

patterns.urgency: Pressure for immediate action with time constraint
patterns.impersonation: Claims to be trusted entity via unknown channel
patterns.secrecy: Asks user not to tell other family members or colleagues
patterns.phone_avoidance: Refuses callback or discourages verification call
patterns.new_account: Requests payment to a bank account not previously used
patterns.phishing_link: Pushes user to click suspicious or lookalike URL
patterns.credential_request: Asks for passwords, OTP, SSN, or account credentials
